situational_context: Running comeback week 3: 5 runs completed since May 3 gap-break (Run #1: 2.47 km, #2: 2.01 km, #3: 3.53 km, #4: 5.01 km, #5: 5.02 km). Run #5 shows clear cardiovascular adaptation — same 5 km distance as Run #4 but avg HR 136 vs 140, max HR 153 vs 175, suffer 19 vs 26. VO2max running ticked up to 38.9 (first improvement since comeback start). Primary modality remains e-bike commuting on sur-site days (~38 km round trip). Chronic load declining (22.3 → 18.7) as older high-load days roll off the 28d window — ACWR improving to 0.89 (entered optimal band [0.8–1.3]). HRV weekly avg stable at 36 (at 90d baseline), sleep trending below target at 6.84h 7d avg. Weight continues gradual decline: ~103.6 kg. Training readiness low at 50 — body battery depleted from accumulated sleep debt. Congés Thu–Fri May 28–29 offer training windows. Nutritionist appointment May 28 (Lucie UGUEN). Return-to-running protocol active: tissue tolerance, not cardio, remains the limiter at 103+ kg.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Sur site (e-bike commute ~38 km, passive load ~16–20)

recommendations.text: Continue running consolidation at 5 km: Run #5 confirmed cardiovascular adaptation (HR avg 136 vs 140, suffer 19 vs 26 at identical distance). Run #6 scheduled May 28 (congés), same 5 km, only if zero localized pain 48h+ post-Run #5. Do not increase distance until 2 consecutive pain-free 5 km runs.
recommendations.measurable: Run #6 completed at 5 km, HR avg ≤137 bpm, no post-run pain >24h

recommendations.text: Prioritize sleep recovery: 7d average has dropped to 6.84h (below 90d baseline of 7.17h). HRV weekly avg declined from 40 to 36 in parallel. Aim for ≥7.5h on 5+ nights this week to restore recovery capacity before Thursday's Run #6.

Increase daily protein toward 150g target — averaging ~126g/day over last 7 days (84% adherence). Critical during running comeback at 103+ kg for tendon and muscle tissue repair. Focus on lunch and dinner protein anchors.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV drops below 33 (>1 sigma below 90d baseline of 36.5)
markers_to_watch.reason: HRV weekly avg declined 40 to 36 over 9 days, now at baseline floor. Further decline suggests recovery debt.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if training readiness stays <50 for 3+ consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently at 50, lowest in the week. Body battery depleted. Needs sleep recovery.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized joint/tendon pain lasting >24h after Run #5 triggers skip of Run #6
markers_to_watch.reason: Tissue tolerance remains the bottleneck at 103+ kg body weight. Run #5 was the 5th impact session in 20 days.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Monitor for stabilization — currently declining (22.3 to 18.7) as older high-load days roll off
markers_to_watch.reason: ACWR improving (0.89) but chronic load base eroding. Consistent sessions needed to rebuild chronic floor.
